steps.title: Set up the ratio relationship
steps.content:
The ratio of base to height is 1 to 7. This means $\frac{\text{base}}{\text{height}} = \frac{1}{7}$, or equivalently:
$$\text{height} = 7 \times \text{base}$$

steps.title: Calculate the height
steps.content:
Substitute base = 112 cm:
$$\text{height} = 7 \times 112 = 784 \text{ cm}$$
That confirms D is correct.
